raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX for {$310.00} and XX/XX/XXXX for {$640.00} I purchased XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX on my Citi credit card. When I received these coins I quickly recognized they were counterfeit and I reached out to XXXX  regarding their money back guarantee, they quickly closed my account and I was no longer able to communicate with them, therefore I reached out to Citi Financial and opened a frauduelent dispute, they quickly closed it over and over again. I contacted a local coin dealer trying to get a cerification that these coins were counterfeit, the local dealer notified me that the only way to verify the counterfeits of XXXX XXXX XXXX is the XXXX XXXX XXXX of the XXXX XXXX. I called the local XXXX XXXX XXXX who instructed me to turn the coins over to the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX here In XXXX XXXX Florida. They opened the case, took the coins into evidence and they gave me the XXXX # XXXX. Citifinancial refuses to open a fraud case on these 2 transactions. At this point I believe I am due the refund from Citifinancial and they can recover their money from XXXX. I would so appreciate any help you can do. 
Original Dispute - Opened XX/XX/XXXX. They denied the last Dispute claim on XX/XX/XXXX.
